spec_match.rationale: Accurately tests the three direct effects of removing [LegacyNoInterfaceObject] from FontFaceSet.

interactive.rationale: Real live readout of browser's FontFaceSet prototype shape on load.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the spec framing of why the feature exists (restoring FontFaceSet global identity).

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully handles browsers where FontFaceSet is undefined without throwing unhandled runtime errors.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to design system styling, though the generic live-probe panel is redundant.

openQuestions.title: Remove or customize the generic live probe panel
openQuestions.detail: The page contains a generic live-probe-panel that checks unrelated APIs (like GPU, mediaDevices). Since the main table already probes the relevant FontFaceSet properties, this generic panel should be removed or updated to probe FontFaceSet-specific features (like font loading status).
